query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: A dark human silhouette stands centered against a bright white background with one arm raised and the hand open. In the bottom left corner, a small open cardboard container holding a round, pale object rests on a dark surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A dark human silhouette, rendered with extreme intentional blur and devoid of any surface detail or texture so that edges and anatomical features dissolve into a smeared, indistinct black mass, stands against a bright white background with one arm raised and the hand open. The ghostly, indistinct figure and stark void-like setting evoke an atmosphere of unease and distress. In the bottom left corner, a small open cardboard container holding a round, pale object rests on a dark surface.
